reviews.review_description:
Follow the glowing firefly through gorgeous cartoon levels with a very funky soundtrack. Add to the music using the interactive elements of each level.

Puzzles are mostly quite simple so it's really about the journey. One small bug - occasionally text is displayed as help but it's too low to actually be read.

Uses "windowed" cutscenes and some of camera changes can be a bit disorienting and will turn you around so the game can't be played in a static seat but overall highly recommended.
360, but not 3d, so no real immersion.

developer_response.body:
Dear artardvark,

Thanks so much for your feedback, much appreciated! We're working to improve the 3D immersion for the game and improving the fixed camera positions as well to achieve a better experience. Be sure to check back sometimes for the changes!


Cheers,
POSSIBLE Games

reviews.review_description: I’m not sure what I am suppose to do in this. The guy just runs around in circles.
i dont want to be rude publicly but I wish i bought an icecream instead.

developer_response.body:
Dear cantenna,

Sorry to hear that your experience was hindered by the lack of controller support. Please note that before purchasing any game, you can get information about the supported control modes. It is clearly indicated in our case on our store page that only touchpad is supported.

We'd be more than happy to offer you a refund, but unfortunately we can't - however, Oculus Support may be able to help you.


Yours,
POSSIBLE Games
